_meta.notes: Yard-master at Tallowfen rendering yard. Tastes the steam, not the wax.

tagline: broad through the chest, faintly always smells of bay leaf.

firstMeet.subject: you didn't ask after the wax
firstMeet.body:
I show visitors the wax. The wax is the photogenic part. The work is in the steam, and most don't ask. You stood at the doorway long enough to taste the steam before you said anything, which is the right order.

If you'd like to learn how the rendering year goes — when the fires bank, when they stoke, when the bay leaf goes in — come on the third afternoon of the next week. The yard will be quiet enough.

— Anselm

metadata.voice: earnest, professional, slightly amused at fancy elven wholesalers
